desc: Command: Test placing a family at a specific height above the current view's level.
summary: Command: Test placing a family at a specific height above the current view's level. Places "63-Wall Mounted" with type "63-Type EX1" at 1800mm above floor level.
usecase: Use when you need to run this command's workflow for the current model task.
notfor: Not for autonomous AI execution. This command requires interactive Revit UI input (dialogs, picks, or manual confirmation).
precondition: - Must be in a plan view with an associated level - Family "63-Wall Mounted" with type "63-Type EX1" must exist in project
postcondition: Family instance is placed at 1800mm above the current view's level at the view center.
